seo.h1: Keyword verbatim or very close. 1 H1 only.
seo.first_strong_first_paragraph: wrap keyword (or close variant) in <strong> in first paragraph
seo.faqs_schema: FAQPage JSON-LD inside BlogPostLayout via faqs prop

geo_aeo.direct_answer_first_60_words: Answer the keyword as a question in first 60 words for AI Overview citation
geo_aeo.stat_with_source_first_200_words: ≥1 stat with year and source in opening section
geo_aeo.brand_mention_conclusion: DayByDay Consulting appears in conclusion (and CTA)
geo_aeo.author_block: BlogPostLayout renders schema Person automatically via partners config
geo_aeo.comparative_table: Tables and lists score higher in extractive QA

technical_jsx.no_raw_lt_gt_in_text: Use < / > or wrap numeric comparisons in {`<2M`} JSX expressions
technical_jsx.no_todo_fixme: Strip TODO, FIXME, XXX, HACK comments before commit
technical_jsx.component_name: PascalCase(slug) + 'Page' — must match filename without extension
technical_jsx.no_new_external_imports: Never add new npm imports. Use only what BlogPostLayout exposes.

content_quality.no_invented_stats: Every number must have year + source. If no source found, do not include the number.
content_quality.differentiator_weave: 1-2 from branding.differentiators woven naturally, NOT as a sales blob
content_quality.author_attribution: Pick Pablo (paid media topics) or Jorge (automation/tech topics) based on cluster
